Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\wlwl4\\Downloads\\hazop-develop" && python -c "
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Pt

prs = Presentation\('전문가검증_발표자료_P&ID공정위험성예측모델개발_template_POSTECH.pptx'\)

print\('슬라이드 수:', len\(prs.slides\)\)
print\('슬라이드 크기:', prs.slide_width.cm, 'x', prs.slide_height.cm, 'cm'\)
print\(\)

for i, slide in enumerate\(prs.slides\):
    print\('=== 슬라이드', i+1, '==='\)
    for shape in slide.shapes:
        name = shape.name
        stype = shape.shape_type
        print\('  shape:', name, '| type:', stype, '| pos:', round\(shape.left/914400,2\), round\(shape.top/914400,2\), '| size:', round\(shape.width/914400,2\), round\(shape.height/914400,2\)\)
        if shape.has_text_frame:
            for para in shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
                for run in para.runs:
                    font = run.font
                    color_rgb = None
                    try:
                        color_rgb = str\(font.color.rgb\)
                    except:
                        pass
                    txt = run.text[:50]
                    print\('    text:', repr\(txt\), '| font:', font.name, '| size:', font.size and round\(font.size.pt\), '| bold:', font.bold, '| color:', color_rgb\)
    print\(\)
")

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Pt, Emu

prs = Presentation\('전문가검증_발표자료_P&ID공정위험성예측모델개발_template_POSTECH.pptx'\)

# 슬라이드 레이아웃 목록
print\('=== 슬라이드 레이아웃 ==='\)
for i, layout in enumerate\(prs.slide_layouts\):
    print\(f'{i}: {layout.name}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 슬라이드 마스터 ==='\)
for i, master in enumerate\(prs.slide_masters\):
    print\(f'master {i}: {len\(master.slide_layouts\)} layouts'\)

# 슬라이드 3 \(섹션 타이틀\) xml 구조 확인
slide3 = prs.slides[2]
print\(\)
print\(f'=== 슬라이드 3 shapes ==='\)
for shape in slide3.shapes:
    print\(f'  {shape.shape_id}: {shape.name} | left={round\(shape.left/914400,3\)} top={round\(shape.top/914400,3\)} w={round\(shape.width/914400,3\)} h={round\(shape.height/914400,3\)}'\)

slide4 = prs.slides[3]
print\(\)
print\(f'=== 슬라이드 4 shapes ==='\)
for shape in slide4.shapes:
    print\(f'  {shape.shape_id}: {shape.name} | left={round\(shape.left/914400,3\)} top={round\(shape.top/914400,3\)} w={round\(shape.width/914400,3\)} h={round\(shape.height/914400,3\)}'\)

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Pt, Emu
from lxml import etree

prs = Presentation\('전문가검증_발표자료_P&ID공정위험성예측모델개발_template_POSTECH.pptx'\)

# 슬라이드 3 \(섹션 타이틀형\) 상단 타이틀 박스 XML
slide3 = prs.slides[2]
for shape in slide3.shapes:
    if 'TextBox 10' in shape.name:
        print\('=== 슬라이드 3 타이틀 TextBox XML ==='\)
        print\(etree.tostring\(shape.element, pretty_print=True\).decode\('utf-8'\)[:3000]\)

# 슬라이드 4 상단 타이틀과 헤더 박스
slide4 = prs.slides[3]
for shape in slide4.shapes:
    if 'TextBox 28' in shape.name or 'Text 9' in shape.name:
        print\(f'=== 슬라이드4 {shape.name} XML ==='\)
        print\(etree.tostring\(shape.element, pretty_print=True\).decode\('utf-8'\)[:2000]\)
PYEOF)

import sys, os
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
basics_dir = 'data/corpus/basics'
for root, dirs, files in os.walk\(basics_dir\):
    level = root.replace\(basics_dir, ''\).count\(os.sep\)
    indent = '  ' * level
    print\(f'{indent}{os.path.basename\(root\)}/'\)
    for f in files:
        size = os.path.getsize\(os.path.join\(root, f\)\)
        print\(f'{indent}  {f}  \({size//1024} KB\)'\)
" 2>&1)

sample = {
    'equipments': [
        {
            'id': 'R-2001', 'type': '반응기', 'material': '톨루엔',
            'spec': {'형식': 'CSTR', '용량': '12.5 m3', '운전 온도': '130C', '운전 압력': '3.5 barg'},
            'nozzles': [{'id': 'N1', 'direction': 'In'}, {'id': 'N2', 'direction': 'Out'}],
        },
        {
            'id': 'T-2001', 'type': '저장탱크', 'material': '톨루엔',
            'spec': {'용량': '50 m3', '운전 압력': '상압'},
        },
    ],
    'lines': [
        {'id': '20010', 'from': 'FEED_HEADER', 'to': 'R-2001-N1', 'components': ['유량 조절 밸브 \(FCV\)']},
        {'id': '20020', 'from': 'R-2001-N2', 'to': 'T-2001', 'components': ['게이트 밸브 \(GV\)']},
    ],
}

print\('=== LLM용 \(전체\) ==='\)

print\(\)

print\(facility_json_to_retrieval_text\(sample\)\)
print\(\)

Bash(python - <<'EOF'
import lancedb

db = lancedb.connect\("./data/vector_db"\)

for table_name in ["accidents", "laws", "designs", "chemicals", "basics"]:
    t = db.open_table\(table_name\)
    count = t.count_rows\(\)
    schema = t.schema
    fields = [f.name for f in schema]
    print\(f"\\n[{table_name}] {count}건"\)
    print\(f"  필드: {fields}"\)
EOF)

Bash(python - <<'EOF'
import lancedb

db = lancedb.connect\("./data/vector_db"\)

# accidents - origin 분포 확인
t = db.open_table\("accidents"\)
import pandas as pd
df = t.to_pandas\(\)
print\("[accidents] origin 분포:"\)
print\(df["origin"].value_counts\(\).to_string\(\)\)

# laws - title 샘플
t = db.open_table\("laws"\)
df = t.to_pandas\(\)
print\("\\n[laws] title 샘플:"\)
print\(df["title"].unique\(\)[:5]\)
print\("[laws] article 비어있는 청크:", \(df["article"] == ""\).sum\(\), "건"\)

# designs - title 샘플 \(KOSHA, KGS\)
t = db.open_table\("designs"\)
df = t.to_pandas\(\)
print\("\\n[designs] title 샘플:"\)
kosha = df[df["title"].str.startswith\("[P"\) | df["title"].str.startswith\("[C"\) | df["title"].str.startswith\("[D"\)]["title"].unique\(\)[:3]
kgs = df[df["title"].str.startswith\("[KGS"\)]["title"].unique\(\)[:3]
print\("  KOSHA:", list\(kosha\)\)
print\("  KGS:  ", list\(kgs\)\)

# basics - category 분포
t = db.open_table\("basics"\)
df = t.to_pandas\(\)
print\("\\n[basics] category 분포:"\)
print\(df["category"].value_counts\(\).to_string\(\)\)
EOF)

# laws title

Bash(python - <<'EOF'
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Pt
import sys

def read_pptx\(path\):
    prs = Presentation\(path\)
    print\(f"\\n{'='*60}"\)
    print\(f"FILE: {path}"\)
    print\(f"Slides: {len\(prs.slides\)}, Width: {prs.slide_width.cm:.1f}cm, Height: {prs.slide_height.cm:.1f}cm"\)
    for i, slide in enumerate\(prs.slides\):
        print\(f"\\n--- Slide {i+1} ---"\)
        for shape in slide.shapes:
            name = shape.name
            left = shape.left / 914400 * 2.54  # EMU to cm
            top = shape.top / 914400 * 2.54
            w = shape.width / 914400 * 2.54
            h = shape.height / 914400 * 2.54
            print\(f"  Shape: {name!r} pos=\({left:.1f},{top:.1f}\) size=\({w:.1f}x{h:.1f}cm\)"\)
            if shape.has_text_frame:
                for para in shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
                    text = para.text.strip\(\)
                    if text:
                        print\(f"    TEXT: {text}"\)

read_pptx\("RAG 부분.pptx"\)
EOF)

import sys, io; sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
import os, glob

corpus_root = './data/corpus'
for folder in ['accidents', 'chemicals', 'laws', 'designs', 'basics']:
    path = os.path.join\(corpus_root, folder\)
    files = [f for f in os.listdir\(path\) if os.path.isfile\(os.path.join\(path, f\)\)]
    exts = {}
    for f in files:
        ext = os.path.splitext\(f\)[1].lower\(\)
        exts[ext] = exts.get\(ext, 0\) + 1
    total_size = sum\(os.path.getsize\(os.path.join\(path, f\)\) for f in files\)
    print\(f'{folder}: {len\(files\)}개 파일  ext={exts}  크기={total_size/1024/1024:.1f}MB'\)
" 2>&1)
